title: Short title
doc_html:
PART V. FRENCH QUARTER MANAGEMENT DISTRICT

§796. Short title

This Part shall be referred to as the "French Quarter Management District."

Acts 2007, No. 280, §1, eff. July 6, 2007; Acts 2011, No. 304, §1.
